memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from Complete Peerage, v 12 pt 1 p 736

Thweng.  Marmaduke de Thweng, son and heir, was a surety in 1199 for Richard malebysse, who had led an attack on Jews sheltering in York Castle.  In 1200 …

zh.Legsby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾萊格斯比
zh.LEGSBY, LINCOLNSHIRE, ENGLAND: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾萊格斯比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marmaduke de Thweng於1178年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆時，他的父親Robert FitzRobert or de Thweng34歲，母親Emma de Lund23歲。他和Lucy Bruce至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1234年在英國越可爾享年56歲。

zh-hans.Legsby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾萊格斯比
zh-hans.LEGSBY, LINCOLNSHIRE, ENGLAND: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾萊格斯比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marmaduke de Thweng于1178年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆时，他的父亲Robert FitzRobert or de Thweng34岁，母亲Emma de Lund23岁。他和Lucy Bruce至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1234年在英国越可爾享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thweng
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so called in East Yorkshire, named with Old Norse thvengr or Old English thweng ‘narrow strip of land’.
History: Martha Thwing (died 1774) is buried in the King's Chapel Burying Ground in Boston MA.

nameMeanings.name: Marmaduke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain derivation. It is generally held to be an Anglicized form of the Old Irish name Mael-Maedóc ‘devotee of Maedóc’. The name Maedóc was borne by various early Irish saints, most notably a 6th-century abbot of Clonmore and a 7th-century bishop of Ferns. Mael-Maedóc Ó Morgair ( 1095–1148 ) was a reformer of the Church in Ireland and a friend of Bernard of Clairvaux. However, the modern Gaelic form (from c.1200 ) is Maol-Maodhóg (pronounced ‘mul-may-og’), so that the name would have had to have been borrowed into English before this loss of the d. Marmaduke has never been common except in Yorkshire, where for example it was bourne by Marmaduke Huby , abbot of Fountains, ( 1495–1526 ). Its most notable bearer in recent times has been Marmaduke Hussey ( 1923–2006 ), a former chairman of the governors of the BBC.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Marmaduke de Thweng was born in 1178, in Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert FitzRobert or de Thweng, was 34 and his mother, Emma de Lund, was 23. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Lucy Bruce. He died in 1234, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marmaduke de Thweng est né en 1178, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert FitzRobert or de Thweng, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Emma de Lund, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Lucy Bruce. Il est décédé en 1234, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marmaduke de Thweng 1178 in Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzRobert or de Thweng 34 und seine Mutter Emma de Lund 23. Er hatte mit Lucy Bruce mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1234 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marmaduke de Thweng è nato il nel 1178 nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert FitzRobert or de Thweng, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Lund, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Lucy Bruce. Morì nel 1234, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marmaduke de Thwengが1178年にイギリスイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父Robert FitzRobert or de Thwengは34歳，母Emma de Lundは23歳であった。彼はLucy Bruceとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1234年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marmaduke de Thweng(이)가 1178년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzRobert or de Thweng(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Lund(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Lucy Bruce(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1234년 영국 요르크실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marmaduke de Thweng nasceu em 1178, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert FitzRobert or de Thweng, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Lund, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Lucy Bruce. Ele faleceu em 1234, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marmaduke de Thweng родился в 1178 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert FitzRobert or de Thweng было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Emma de Lund, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Lucy Bruce. Он умер в 1234 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marmaduke de Thweng nació en 1178, en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert FitzRobert or de Thweng, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Emma de Lund, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Lucy Bruce. Murió en 1234, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
